name: lumorix-null-district
description: Lumorix: Null District playable beta monorepo.

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,desktop -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @nulldistrict/server" "npm run dev -w @nulldistrict/desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:desktop
scripts.build:shared: npm run build -w @nulldistrict/shared && npm run build -w @nulldistrict/game-data
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck -w @nulldistrict/server && npm run typecheck -w @nulldistrict/desktop && npm run typecheck -w @nulldistrict/admin
